subtitle: 婚礼片大集合+体育励志片马拉松
opus_summary: Netflix六月片单公布，亮点包括Jennifer Lopez新片《Office Romance》、大量经典婚礼电影（《我最好朋友的婚礼》《四个婚礼和一个葬礼》等）以及体育励志片集中上线（《洛奇》系列、《奎迪》三部曲、《龙威小子》等）。此外《降世神通：最后的气宗》第二季将于6月25日上线。

paragraphs.en: There's no "June Gloom" for Netflix this year. Not only are we getting a new Jennifer Lopez/Brett Goldstein rom-com, Office Romance, but also a veritable avalanche of wedding movies from Julia Roberts joints My Best Friend's Wedding and Runaway Bride to films like Made of Honor, Rachel Getting Married, Father of the Bride, The Wedding Date, Four Weddings and a Funeral, and J.Lo (again) in The Wedding Planner.
paragraphs.cn: Netflix今年六月可没有什么「六月忧郁」。我们不仅迎来Jennifer Lopez和Brett Goldstein主演的新爱情喜剧《Office Romance》，还有一场婚礼电影的雪崩——从Julia Roberts的《我最好朋友的婚礼》《落跑新娘》，到《乘龙快婿》《乔治亚的烦恼》《新岳父大人》《乘龙快婿》《四个婚礼和一个葬礼》，再到J.Lo（又是她）的《乘龙快婿》。

paragraphs.en: There are also a ton of underdog sports movies to immerse yourself in, like the Karate Kids, (most of) the Rockys, the Creeds (which are also Rockys), Rookie of the Year, Rudy, and Miracle.
paragraphs.cn: 还有大量热血体育励志片等你沉浸，包括《龙威小子》系列、（大部分）《洛奇》系列、《奎迪》三部曲（本质上也是洛奇），以及《乐乐联盟》《乐乐联盟》和《奇迹》。

paragraphs.en: So while you ponder the how/why/who of Netflix raising its prices once again, here's a rundown of every series, special, movie, and doc landing on Netflix in June...
paragraphs.cn: 所以，在你琢磨Netflix又双叒叕涨价的前因后果时，这里是六月所有登陆Netflix的剧集、特别节目、电影和纪录片的完整清单……

paragraphs.en: Coming Soon/TBD: BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai: Season 1 Part 2 (Japan, series); Husbands in Action (South Korea, movie); Jae-seok's B&B Rules! (South Korea, series); Notes from the Last Row (South Korea, series)
paragraphs.cn: 即将上线/待定：《刃牙道：无敌武士》第一季下半部（日本，剧集）；《丈夫出动》（韩国，电影）；《刘在石的民宿规则！》（韩国，剧集）；《最后一排的笔记》（韩国，剧集）

paragraphs.en: June 1 highlights: Bee Movie (2007), The Big Lebowski (1998), The Chronicles of Riddick (2004), Cinderella Man (2005), Creed (2015), Creed II (2018), Creed III (2023), Father of the Bride (1991), Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994), The Karate Kid (1984/2010), Little Miss Sunshine (2006), My Best Friend's Wedding (1997), Rocky series, Rookie of the Year (1993), Rudy (1993), Scooby-Doo (2002)

June 3-7: David (movie, 2025); Michael Jackson: The Verdict (doc); Office Romance (movie); Grey's Anatomy: Season 22; Resident Alien: Season 4; Poor Things (movie, 2023); USA 94: Brazil's Return to Glory (doc)
paragraphs.cn: 6月3-7日：《David》(电影, 2025)；《迈克尔·杰克逊：判决》(纪录片)；《Office Romance》(电影)；《实习医生格蕾》第22季；《居家外星人》第4季；《可怜的东西》(电影, 2023)；《USA 94：巴西重返荣耀》(纪录片)

paragraphs.en: June 10-19: Colors Of Evil: Black (Poland, movie); Outlast: The Jungle (series); Sweet Magnolias: Season 5; Percy Jackson movies (2010, 2013); America's Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Season 3; The Amazing Digital Circus: The Last Act
paragraphs.cn: 6月10-19日：《邪恶之色：黑》(波兰电影)；《坚持到底：丛林篇》(真人秀)；《甜木兰》第5季；《波西·杰克逊与闪电窃贼》(2010)和《波西·杰克逊与魔兽之海》(2013)；《美国甜心：达拉斯牛仔啦啦队》第3季；《神奇数字马戏团：最终幕》

paragraphs.en: June 20-30: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Season 2 (June 25); Pokémon Horizons: Season 3—Rising Hope Part 3 (June 26); Sullivan's Crossing Season 4 (June 30)
paragraphs.cn: 6月20-30日：《降世神通：最后的气宗》第二季（6月25日）；《宝可梦：地平线》第三季——崛起希望 下篇（6月26日）；《沙利文的十字路口》第四季（6月30日）

paragraphs.en: Leaving Netflix in June: Fifty Shades trilogy (June 1), Kim's Convenience Seasons 1-5 (June 2), Blindspot Seasons 1-5 (June 7), The Iron Claw (June 19), The Expendables franchise (June 20), Sex and the City Seasons 1-6 (June 30)
paragraphs.cn: 六月下架内容：《五十度灰》三部曲（6月1日）、《金氏便利店》全5季（6月2日）、《盲点》全5季（6月7日）、《铁爪》（6月19日）、《敢死队》系列（6月20日）、《欲望都市》全6季（6月30日）
